title: MC Plus
description: Improving on Minecraft with new content, improving base content, and content updates.
body:
![MC Plus Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dd937e72e1e12882a8cde6ac16673ec76fd39c7.png)

Explore an improved world in MC Plus, a modpack based on improving the game with better performance, new content, and improved base content such as combat, aswell as terrain generation, powered by Geophilic.

![New Stuff In MC Plus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1881cb4bd2995d58e061fa00e53b9732aad00e4.png)

MC Plus, while still in beta, adds a variety of things currently.
Our new content includes these core features, with more to come via content updates:
- New hydration system - Stay hydrated, water is important.
- Seasons system - Watch the leaves turn orange and red during Autumn.
- Improved combat - Get more satisfying kills with MC Plus's improved combat.
- Better biomes - Base game biomes look much better in MC Plus.

And there's more to be found in the modpack.
